infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is required for identity verification to capture documents and facial photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is required to record video for liveness verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access is required to upload document images.
infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: NFC is used to read passport chip data for identity verification.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location access is used to detect your country for identity verification.
